api.domains.errors.domain_id_required.context: Returned when a domains-API request is missing the extid path parameter

api.domains.errors.domain_not_found.context: Returned when CustomDomain.find_by_extid returns nil for the requested extid (apps/api/domains/logic/incoming_config/base.rb)

api.domains.errors.organization_not_foun.context: Returned when Organization.load returns nil for the domain's org_id (apps/api/domains/logic/incoming_config/base.rb)

api.domains.errors.incoming_secrets_disa.text: Incoming secrets is not enabled on this instance
api.domains.errors.incoming_secrets_disa.context: Returned when features.incoming.enabled is false at the instance level (apps/api/domains/logic/incoming_config/base.rb)

api.domains.errors.incoming_secrets_enti.text: Incoming secrets management requires the incoming_secrets entitlement. Please upgrade your plan.
api.domains.errors.incoming_secrets_enti.context: Returned when the owning organization lacks the incoming_secrets entitlement (apps/api/domains/logic/incoming_config/base.rb)

api.domains.errors.incoming_config_not_f.text: Incoming configuration not found for domain: %{extid}
api.domains.errors.incoming_config_not_f.context: Returned by DELETE /api/domains/:extid/incoming-config when no IncomingConfig record exists for the domain

api.domains.errors.recipients_max_exceed.context: Returned by PUT /api/domains/:extid/incoming-config when the request body contains more than IncomingConfig::MAX_RECIPIENTS entries

api.domains.errors.recipients_invalid_em.context: Returned by PUT /api/domains/:extid/incoming-config when a recipient email fails Truemail validation

api.domains.errors.recipients_duplicate.context: Returned by PUT /api/domains/:extid/incoming-config when the request body contains the same email address more than once
